snippet: Student Excellence Program (SEP) funding is provided to enable schools to expand their support for high-ability students. SEP funding is provided to all schools except for: Specialist schools can submit a request to the Targeted Programs Unit for consideration for funding. SEP funding allocations are calculated by the department, with allocations based on the number of students enrolled at the school (their cohort size). Funding is provided to schools through the Student Resource Package (SRP) as a 100% cash allocation.
